mapper.select: SELECT wt.team_no, wt.team_name, wt.team_location, pl.line_name, u.name AS team_leader, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE team_no = wt.team_no) AS team_member_num FROM work_teams wt LEFT JOIN users u ON u.team_no = wt.team_no AND u.position = '班组长' LEFT JOIN production_lines pl ON pl.line_no = wt.line_no WHERE wt.team_no = #{teamNo}
